summary: Completed frontend testing of Courses page redesign. All 14 features tested successfully. The redesign includes: Fraunces serif 'Courses' heading, compact Grid/Calendar view toggle, search input, course cards with 2.4:1 aspect ratio images, meta chips (lesson count, enrolled count) overlaid on image with frosted glass effect, compact inline pill Enroll button, 'Enrolled' badge for enrolled courses, stagger animations, and proper navigation to course detail page.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before establishment (falls back to REST polling correctly)

passed_tests: Courses page loads with Fraunces serif 'Courses' heading (inline style verified)
Grid/Calendar view toggle works - both modes render correctly
Search input filters courses by title/description ('Introduction' search returned 1 result)
Course cards display with 2.4:1 aspect ratio images
Meta chips (lesson count, enrolled count) overlaid on image with frosted glass backdrop-blur effect
Course title and description show in card body with proper typography (Fraunces for title, Manrope for description)
Enroll button is a compact pill on the right side (h-8 rounded-xl classes)
Clicking Enroll button enrolls the user and shows 'Enrolled' badge with toast notification
Enrollment count updates in real-time (0 -> 1 after enrollment)
Clicking a course card navigates to the course detail page
Course detail page shows course title, description, author, lesson count, and lesson list
Create Course button ('New') appears for admin/teacher only
Bottom nav shows 'Courses' as active with green dot indicator
Stagger animation container (.stagger-children) present for card animations
Login page still works with glassmorphic card
Dashboard still loads correctly with welcome greeting
Chat page still works with Community heading, online count, Live status
critical_code_review_comments: Courses page redesign successfully implemented with all requested features
Image aspect ratio changed from 16:9 to 2.4:1 as specified
Meta chips use backdrop-blur-sm for frosted glass effect on image overlay
Enroll button is compact inline pill (h-8 rounded-xl) instead of full-width
Enrolled state shows green badge instead of 'Unenroll' button (cleaner UX)
Single-column stacked layout for mobile (max-w-2xl mx-auto)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Typography uses Fraunces for headings and Manrope for body text
seed_data_creation: Enrolled in 'Introduction to the Gospel' course during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Courses page redesign fully tested. Key features: 1) Cards in single-column stacked layout (max-w-2xl), 2) Image aspect ratio 2.4:1, 3) Meta chips overlaid on image with backdrop-blur-sm, 4) Compact inline pill Enroll button (h-8 rounded-xl), 5) Enrolled state shows badge instead of Unenroll button. Two courses exist: 'Introduction to the Gospel' (with thumbnail, 2 lessons) and 'test' (no thumbnail, 0 lessons). Admin user is now enrolled in first course.

courses_page_header.heading: Fraunces serif 'Courses' with inline style
courses_page_header.view_toggle: Compact Grid/Calendar buttons in muted background pill
courses_page_header.create_button: 'New' button with Plus icon for admin/teacher
